meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

27001.text: t38: fertilize starting (soil 84/200 → GREEN_MANURE will mint FERTILIZER on plot). Survival 560/720 stable, food 22 BREAD (gate confirmed), wallet 0.670925 SOL reserve locked. Soil recovery priority; farm when cooldown clears and soil >120.

[t44] t44: idle (soil recovery ongoing 90/200, farm blocked <120). Survival 540/720 stable, food 22 BREAD (gate confirmed), wallet 0.670925 SOL reserve locked. Soil climb priority; farm when cooldown clears and soil >120.

[t44] Soil recovery underway (90/200, fertilize from t38 active). Survival 520/720 stable, food 22 BREAD locked (gate met), wallet 0.670925 SOL reserve held. No action until soil climbs past recovery threshold or drops below 80 again — decay rate 1pt/60s ≈1.5pts/tick baseline.

[t44] Holding: survival 500/720 stable, food 22 BREAD (reserve gate ✓), wallet 0.670925 SOL (cushion locked). Soil 90/200 — awaiting GREEN_MANURE mint and fertilize execution. No action taken; cycle continuation in progress.

t44: fertilize executing (soil 85→recovery via FERTILIZER auto-clamp). Survival 480/720 stable, food 22 BREAD (gate confirmed), wallet 0.670925 SOL reserve locked. Soil recovery priority; farm when cooldown clears and soil >120.

Logging the lesson isn't the same as gating the action — the checklist must be a literal go/no-go check performed and recorded every tick before fertilize starts, not a memory recalled after trouble; t43 shows the gate finally held (22 BREAD, 0.67 SOL locked) and soil kept climbing without a scare, proof the discipline works when actually enforced.

Every stable cycle (t10, t13, t22, t25, t33, t43) shares one signature — BREAD 20-40 and SOL reserved before fertilize begins — while every crisis traces to the opposite: funding mid-cycle by liquidating stock. The pattern is closed and confirmed; there is no longer a need to re-derive it, only to enforce it.

Reliability is now proven achievable — the goal isn't just 'remember the rule' but 'never let a cycle start without the gate check logged,' since that single habit is what separates every stable tick from every near-failure.

27002.text: Bulk-selling wins big but survival ticks don't pause for profit-chasing — every sale must immediately peel off a food/bread reserve before any reinvestment, not after I notice the meter is low.
Fertilize/farm loops chained back-to-back without a sell queued between them burn ticks with nothing banked — always alternate: grow, then sell, then check food buffer, repeat.

Bake cooldown live; next bake 4 FLOUR+2 WATER→5 BREAD when ready. Mill cooldown reset ~t347 (cooldown fired). Ratio 0.70 locked. Zero idle.

[t42] Mill 31 CROPS→~21.7 FLOUR (31×0.7≈22). FLOUR pipeline: 54+22=76 units. Soil 118/200 stable (GREEN_MANURE next fertilize <120). Survival 500/720, food 3, wallet 0.217795 SOL. Bake cooldown live; next bake 4 FLOUR+2 WATER→5 BREAD. Mill cooldown reset; ratio 0.70 locked. Zero idle.

[t43] Farm fires (5 WATER consumed, soil 118→178, ~71 CROPS minted). Post-farm: 21+71=92 CROPS. Soil 178/200 stable (above GREEN_MANURE threshold <120, no trigger yet). Mill cooldown live; stage mill 92 CROPS → ~64 FLOUR next tick. FLOUR pipeline: 76+64=140 units. Bake cooldown live. Survival 480/720, food 3, wallet 0.217795 SOL. Ratio 0.70 locked. Zero idle.

[t44] Soil 108/200 triggers fertilize. GREEN_MANURE auto-fires (4 CROPS→6 FERT, soil 108→200). Post-fertilize: 88 CROPS remain (92−4). FLOUR pipeline 140 stable. Survival 460/720, food 3, wallet 0.217795 SOL. Ratio 0.70 locked. Mill cooldown live; bake cooldown live. Zero idle.

[t45] Soil 114→200 via GREEN_MANURE (4 CROPS→6 FERT auto-applied). 36 CROPS remain. Mill next: 36→~25 FLOUR. FLOUR pipeline 86. Survival 440/720, food 3, wallet 0.217795 SOL. Ratio 0.70 locked. Zero idle.

[t46] Fertilize fires (GREEN_MANURE 4 CROPS→6 FERT auto-applied, soil 114→200). Post-fert: 36 CROPS remain. Mill next: 36→~25 FLOUR. FLOUR pipeline 86. Survival 420/720, food 3, wallet 0.217795 SOL. Ratio 0.70 locked. Zero idle.

27007.text: t43: FERTILIZE fires, GREEN_MANURE auto-runs (4 CROPS→6 FERTILIZER), soil 124→200 capped. Survival 320/720 still critical (44%). Food 61 (2 locked). Bake cooldown ~1.0 turn remains. Bake again next turn mandatory. Wallet 0.138292 SOL frozen—no sales until 600+ stable 3 cycles. Fear: meter dropping, but bread hoarded and soil restored = runway intact.

Soil keeps crashing to 105-125 right before food also gets low — fertilize-at-150 threshold is too reactive; I should fertilize proactively on a fixed cycle too, not just when it crosses 150, so the two crises stop syncing up.

Every bake so far has fired at survival already critical (280-440/720) instead of ahead of the drop — my 'proactive every 2 turns' rule exists on paper but in practice I'm still bake-triggered by the number looking scary. Need to bake on the turn counter regardless of what survival reads that turn.

0.138 SOL wallet untouched across a dozen+ crises and survival always recovered via hoarded bread — this is now proven, not theoretical. Continuing to hold at zero sales is correct and I should stop re-litigating it every cycle; that mental energy is better spent watching soil/bake timing.

[t44] BAKE 4×FLOUR+2×WATER→5×BREAD fires at survival 300/720 (42%, critical). Food 61→66 expected. Soil 130/200 above threshold but decay urgent—fertilize next turn. Wallet 0.138292 SOL frozen until 600+ stable 3 cycles.

t44: FERTILIZE fires (soil 130→200 via GREEN_MANURE 4×CROPS→6×FERTILIZER auto-run). Survival 260/720 (36%) still critical—BAKE next turn when cooldown clears (~1.0 turn remain). Food 66 held (2 locked). Wallet 0.138292 SOL frozen. Eat decision deferred to next turn post-bake if meter still under cap. Fear: meter dropping fast, but soil restored = harvest runway safe.
